case-studies.need: Connect hospitals and data centers to handle rapid growth and changing IT needs.
case-studies.solution: Built two dedicated 40 GB links between data centers, providing high bandwidth and low latency.
case-studies.quote: Great Plains Communications provides dependable fiber to connect our two data centers as one.

case-studies.need: High-bandwidth requirements, a specific custom design, and an aggressive timeline for mission-critical operations.
case-studies.solution: Customized design delivering 4x400G waves connected to a major Western data center, ahead of schedule.
case-studies.quote: Reliable connectivity for critical operations and attention to every detail were all part of a successful delivery.

case-studies.need: Rapid growth required consistent upload speeds and uniform network performance across 14 locations.
case-studies.solution: Delivered 100x100 Mbps symmetrical broadband and business voice over our 100% fiber-optic network.
case-studies.quote: GPC's tailored approach delivered robust, uniform connectivity and improved infrastructure.
